'''Heriston''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Atravis sector/Legends|Atravis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Locations==
===Imperial refueling and repair depot===
Established soon after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|35|Heriston}}</ref> the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] depot at Heriston was a key [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. In addition to standard refueling and repair facilities, the station boasted a [[Drydock/Legends|drydock]], a rarity in the Outer Rim at the time.<ref name="RESB" /><ref name="TCSWE" /> Prior to the establishment of the station at Heriston, Imperial [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] operating in the area were often forced to travel closer to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]] if they required the services of a drydock. Two sectors over, the Imperial station located at [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]] offered comparable facilities, but was rarely a viable option, as it was often fully engaged in maintaining the [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector's]] defense [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. The station at Heriston was well-protected by a number of space platforms, as well as multiple [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Fighter wing/Legends|wings]] and [[Patrol ship/Legends|system patrol craft]]. At one point during the time between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Adversary (Star Destroyer)|''Adversary'']] underwent routine maintenance and repairs there.<ref name="RESB" />
